name: Contract probe
description: Slice 11.5 C7 pathological coverage. Declares four actions exercising every canonical contract-error code: tool_threw, schema_violation, tool_not_found, tool_timeout. Subscribes to `_ggui:contract-error` and paints each envelope as DOM so the Lane-1 Playwright spec can assert the canonical contract-error emission without peeking at activity internals.

contract.intent: Exercise every canonical contract-error code emitted by the wiredActionRouter — tool_threw via a broken action, schema_violation via a malformed refresh, tool_not_found via an unregistered tool name, tool_timeout via a hanging tool.

triggerBroken.label: Trigger broken tool
triggerBroken.description: Wires to `tasks_broken` — always throws. Expected envelope code: TOOL_THREW.

triggerMalformedRefresh.label: Trigger malformed refresh
triggerMalformedRefresh.description: Wires to `tasks_list` (valid). The `tasks` channel refresh is `tasks_malformed_list` (returns wrong shape). Expected envelope code: SCHEMA_VIOLATION on the refresh side.

triggerNotFound.label: Trigger tool-not-found
triggerNotFound.description: Wires to `doesNotExist` — deliberately NOT registered on the tasks mount. The router's `has()` check fails and emits TOOL_NOT_FOUND before any invocation. Tool name matches the conformance fixture `wired-action-tool-not-found.json`'s `expectedBehavior.toolName`.

triggerTimeout.label: Trigger tool-timeout
triggerTimeout.description: Wires to `hanging_tool` — sleeps past the wiredActionRouter timeout. The router races invoke against the configured timeout and emits TOOL_TIMEOUT when the timer wins. Tool name matches the conformance fixture `wired-action-tool-timeout.json`'s `expectedBehavior.toolName`.

tasks.description: Refreshes from `tasks_malformed_list` on every wired action. The declared schema rejects the `{wrong:'shape'}` shape that tool returns, so the refresh emits a contract-error envelope rather than mutating this channel.
